programme.desc: Gon and his friends come face-to-face with Chimera Ants for the first time and are frightened by their speed and power.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The Chimera Ants become increasingly vicious after eating the members of the NGL underground.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The Hunter Association sets out to eliminate the Chimera Ants.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER: A x Fated x Awakening
programme.desc: Hagya attacks Gon, Killua and Kite. Meanwhile, the first of the Queen's Royal Guards is about to be born.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Kite, Gon and Killua continue using Nen to follow Hagya to the Chimera Ant's nest.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and Killua vow to get stronger so they can return and rescue Kite.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Even though they are intimidated by Knuckle, Gon and Killua proceed with Biscuit's training.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and Killua are exhausted after their fight with Knuckle as the second assassin, Shoot, lies in wait.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Birth of a Superbeing
programme.desc: Having seized the Red Stone and the mask, Kars has become the Ultimate Being. Now the seemingly invincible entity has his sights solely on Joseph who, fleeing, has one final trick up his sleeve.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Ascendant One
programme.desc: Deep within a volcano’s molten lava, Kars contemplates a comeback. But with the Red Stone’s power unleashed, both warriors are launched into the stratosphere of the unknown.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon heads to Porthcurno to see the incredible cables that stretch from this little village to South America, Australia, and India. Phil Serrell goes for a ride on a replica of the Puffing Devil.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon heads to the Royal Mint and finds out how Sir Isaac Newton revolutionized coins to prevent forgers. Phil Serrell gets a lesson in the culture at the Bristol Old Vic and discovers why it's a miracle the building still stands.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Claire Rawle are in Northumberland. Paul discovers the Morpeth Olympics and Claire learns about the female Indiana Jones, Gertrude Bell. Everything's rosy until Claire mentions she loves militaria -- Paul's specialty!

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Claire Rawle finds out about the Tynemouth Volunteer Life Brigade and Paul Laidlaw visits a military observation post in Blyth. And Paul finds some RAF stereoscopic aerial reconnaissance photographs of German U-boats at a great price.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Claire Rawle discovers the history of big game fishing in the 1930s, while Paul Laidlaw sets off to rendezvous in a secret WWII bunker. Paul buys a pair of Charles Barlow vases, and Claire picks up an early 20th-century spectacle case.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw finds a rare 18th-century puzzle jug, and Claire Rawle some Shelley porcelain. Paul discovers how Hull was vital to thousands of Jews fleeing from Tsarist Russia and Claire indulges her passion for all things railway.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In the final, Paul Laidlaw hopes a late 17th-century hand-forged halberd head will earn him a huge profit. Claire Rawle buys a Chinese cloisonné vase and an Edwardian inkstand. Will Claire be the comeback kid and crush the mighty Laidlaw?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and Mark Stacey take their classic car to an auction in Merseyside. Christina detours to learn about the history of the British seaside in Bognor Regis and Mark visits the last surviving Victorian Brickworks in Britain.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and Mark Stacey's antiquing adventure continues in the Cotswolds. Mark discovers a rural idyll that inspired a best seller novel while Christina learns about an incredible war hero.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Cheshire, Christina Trevanion ends up deep underground and Mark Stacey finds himself in such a predicament he has to call for help! Mark finds a Home Guard practice rifle while Christina makes a peculiar purchase of a human jaw.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and Mark Stacey travel in the West Midlands in their classic car. Mark visits the factory that profited from the Victorian obsession with death. Christina learns why the original Land Rover became a global phenomenon.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a race to the finish! Just twenty pounds separates Christina Trevanion and Mark Stacey. Mark is literally stuck and struggling waist-deep in antiques. Christina moves into property and buys a rather unique home.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin and Paul Laidlaw visit the West Coast of Scotland. Military buff Paul gets excited when he finds some desk ink stamps dating from the Cold War. Natasha ends up on ice as she gets to grips with an ancient sport in Ayrshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Cumbria is the destination for Natasha Raskin and Paul Laidlaw and their classic Mercedes. Natasha visits a mint cake factory while Paul discovers an intriguing side to Cumbria's wartime past.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Members of the public have their antiques valued by experts. Fiona Bruce and the team are in County Durham for a visit to The Bowes Museum.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team of experts welcome thousands to Bletchley Park near Milton Keynes, home of the Enigma code-breaking team in World War Two.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A return visit to Bletchley Park near Milton Keynes for Fiona Bruce and the experts.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Burghley House near Stamford in Lincolnshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts head to the Scottish borders for another busy day of valuations at Abbotsford, near Melrose, once the home of Sir Walter Scott.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team set sail for the Channel Islands where the people of Guernsey give them a warm welcome at Saumarez Park.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team are at full throttle as they arrive at Brooklands Motor Racing and Aviation Museum near Weybridge in Surrey.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to the Brooklands Museum near Weybridge. Objects of note include a rare and highly valuable stirrup cup and books once owned by Churchill.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team heads to Wales as Fiona Bruce and the experts arrive at Aberglasney Gardens in Carmarthenshire, where they find a deluge of treasures.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team are in Bath where thousands flock to the Assembly Rooms with their treasured objects. Items under scrutiny include a marble statue, a pair of antique bronzes found under a caravan, and a genuine work by Constable.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A second helping from Bath, where Fiona Bruce and the team welcome visitors to the magnificent Assembly Rooms. Treasures include a rare teapot and an unusual image of Hitler.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head to Blists Hill Victorian Town near Ironbridge in Shropshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit a packed Leeds Town Hall. Among the items are a 15th-century spoon and a diamond brooch left as security for an unpaid off-licence bill.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The programme makes a return visit to Leeds Town Hall as Fiona Bruce and the team of experts set up for another busy day.

programme.title: The Dark: Nature's Nighttime World
programme.desc: Bryson Volrin encounters a curious sloth; Gordon Buchanan enters a deserted house that has been taken over by vampire bats.

programme.title: The Dark: Nature's Nighttime World
programme.desc: Bryson Volrin encounters a curious sloth; Gordon Buchanan enters a deserted house that has been taken over by vampire bats.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Road to Mexico
programme.desc: Rick lands in the town that gave the world tequila and the metropolis that birthed mariachis and dishes like chilli con carne.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Road to Mexico
programme.desc: Rick Stein visits the Mexican capital to sample the Aztec cuisine.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Dish of the Day
programme.desc: Nigel shows ways to cook with an abundance of ingredients.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Dish of the Day
programme.desc: Nigel cooks haddock chowder, crumbed lamb steak with buttered Swede mash and fennel feta linguine.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Dish of the Day
programme.desc: Nigel introduces new flavor combinations that will reinvigorate our weekly shopping; ricotta beef burger, sesame seed salmon with miring and lemon and thyme cake.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Dish of the Day
programme.desc: Nigel cooks seven delicious dishes, including chicken and leek pie, mushroom medley and raspberry and cinnamon meringue.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Dish of the Day
programme.desc: Nigel demonstrates that sometimes simple cookery is the best; herby artichoke stew, chicken in cider and compost crumble.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Dish of the Day
programme.desc: Nigel offers butternut squash soup with crisps, rib ragout and cherry chocolate iced rice.

programme.title: Ainsley's Barbecue Bible
programme.desc: The series kicks off with a complete guide to cooking on coals, from lighting the fire to the barbecue essentials; Ainsley also tests different types of barbecues.

programme.title: Ainsley's Barbecue Bible
programme.desc: Visiting the Greek Island of Alonnisos to sample traditional barbecue consisting of spit-roasted lamb and hortopitta.

programme.title: Ainsley's Barbecue Bible
programme.desc: Visiting South Africa to find unusual recipes for cooking over coals.

programme.title: Ainsley's Barbecue Bible
programme.desc: Visiting Thailand to sample a unique recipe for fish and chips and a barbecue cornucopia.

programme.title: Ainsley's Barbecue Bible

programme.title: La impostora

programme.title: La impostora

programme.title: El Bronx

programme.title: El Bronx

programme.title: El Bronx
programme.desc: La ambición de Manolo por el dinero complica la liberación de Juliana y por ende los planes de Carlos. Sara tendrá que asumir una medida cautelar por el bien inmueble de los derechos adquiridos por Gerardo Noriega.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Fernando intenta seducir a Valeria, ella enfurece y él logra someterla. Zoraida lleva a Miguel a una reunión de trabajo provocando incomodidad en todos. Lorna no tiene escapatoria.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Valeria hace un importante descubrimiento en el diario de su madre y lo comparte con la Nana. Decide olvidar todo lo malo que ha pasado y preparar su boda, pero todo está a punto de cambiar.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Francisco se entera del engaño de Mercedes, quien le pide que vaya a ver a Laura, él se siente acorralado, debe hablar con su hijo y con Valeria. Jorge enfrenta a su padre y lo amenaza.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: He's no stranger to unkempt bars, but Jon is absolutely disgusted by the rat, roach, and raccoon problem inside Freaki Tiki.

programme.title: Bar Rescue

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Two best friends are acting more like jackasses than owners and find themselves on the verge of losing their dream.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is called in to help the failing owner of Baseline Sports Bar, whose sexually exploitive spaghetti wrestling events have driven away female customers.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In affluent Aurora, CO, an undisciplined singer turned bar owner has allowed his bloated ego to destroy his business and family, and Jon's team must repair the damage.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Tampa, Florida to help save an owner who has suffered personal loss and health scares while trying to single-handedly keep his struggling bar afloat.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon returns to Puerto Rico, where he used to live, to rescue a bar destroyed by Hurricane Maria and to help revive the rest of the community.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Rescuing the Russell City Grill & Sports Bar was already going to be a challenge, but a violent brawl makes Jon question if it's even worth saving.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Before he can save their failing bar, Jon must navigate the turbulent business partnership between an ex-pilot and his ex-girlfriend.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The owner of City Bar compounded his troubles when he approved a poorly received fetish night, so Jon must help him come up with a new plan to whip up business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is in Midvale, Utah, to meet The Union owner Bill, who is over $500,000 in debt and hasn't picked up any of the bar knowledge required to help his staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: It's deja vu when Jon returns to Second Base Bar to find it's once again on the brink of failure, leaving him to decide whether or not he wants to attempt a re-rescue.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A hostile chef and a lascivious owner complicate Jon's efforts to save Dimples, America's oldest karaoke bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A 40-year-old dive bar in California is on the brink of collapse, and Jon must decide if the owner should stay in charge as manager or cede power to his daughter.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch's impending birthday prompts him to train for an ironman competition, getting swept off his feet by a younger woman along the way. Matt takes a night job to save money for a motorcycle, jeopardizing his coworkers through his exhaustion.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A new lifeguard helps Mitch and the Baywatch lifeguards confront an upsurge in gang activity, and CJ is enamored with a beach magician who nearly drowns during a bungled underwater stunt.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The Baywatch lifeguards stage a beach-oriented Special Olympics, becoming involved with two young physically-challenged athletes whose parents have abandoned them.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Jesse Majors, the beautiful motorcycle racer that Matt fell in love with, returns, putting strain on Matt and Summer’s relationship.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: An ad hoc reunion of elite 1950s lifeguards, the "Red Knights," triggers a bar brawl and Ben's resignation. Meanwhile, Mitch helps deliver a baby when the mother goes into premature labor while swimming at the beach.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The Baywatch lifeguards travel to San Diego for a week where Summer is haunted by the hotel's legendary ghost. CJ grows attached to an orphaned dolphin at Sea World. And Mitch is stranded at sea with his brother when their sailboat capsizes.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Adrift in the ocean with his semi-conscious brother, Mitch struggles to keep himself and Buzzy alive through the long, cold night. CJ unites an orphaned dolphin with its injured mother, and Summer becomes obsessed with a passionate ghost.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A beautiful woman and her plain sister compete for Mitch's affection with perilous results. Matt confronts the sudden onset of a paralyzing fear of sharks, that may in reality be a far different fear.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: An investigative reporter is working on a story which details the sale of U.S. military technology by businessman Edward Falcon. The story is so incriminating that her life is put at risk. Can the Baywatch team help her get out alive?

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Country and Western superstar Jessie Lee Harris takes a detour from his concert schedule and pays a visit to Baywatch in search of his estranged wife and son

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When severe cutbacks put the Baywatch lifeguards’ jobs in jeopardy, Matt and Summer volunteer to guard as civilians. But can they convince the county commissioners to increase the budget before lifeguards are laid off?

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie Holden spends a week with the Coast Guard to help them crack a dangerous arms smuggling ring.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Matt doesn't know whose story to believe when he tries to reunite a runaway teen and her frantic father. Meanwhile, Stephanie must choose between Mitch and Scott.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A Hollywood producer desperate for a new TV series idea observes a rescue on the Baywatch beach and realizes that a television series based on lifeguarding is perfect, sending Baywatch headquarters into a tizzy.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Alisha says her son, Kevin, 10, pushed the family to the limit with violent outbursts. At home, knives and lighters are hidden & siblings lock themselves in their rooms at night. Alisha's says the 'future Kevin' may hurt the entire family or end a life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mom Kelly says Ellie, 16, is on a path of self-destruction, & she fears for her daughter's life. Ellie has an eating disorder, is suicidal, cuts herself & has overdosed on drugs while lashing out in anger on a daily basis. Dr. Phil helps set a new path.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Marissa, 22, says her family treated her like an outcast in childhood & she later began working as an escort to make ends meet. Marissa faces family for the first time in 3 years on Dr. Phil's stage. Did they indeed reject her & is there hope for repair?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Megan's ex-boyfriend Andy is trying to replace her as their 5-year-old son's mother with his new fiancée, Caitlin. Megan says Andy lied to the judge, falsely painting her as unfit, unstable & a drug addict. Andy says Megan's tale of woe is a sob story.

programme.desc: Jethro heads down to the Reserves HQ while wearing an ancestor's Confederate Army uniform. The Sergeant thinks he's an actor there to participate in a Civil War reenactment. Jethro runs home to tell Granny the Civil War is still on.

programme.desc: Col. Blake asks the actor playing Gen. Grant to play along with Granny so that the Civil War movie can continue. Meanwhile, Jethro uses his 6th grade education to take the written test to enter the Reserves.

Mary, Rose and Pearl may be sent 'up the river' after they go overboard defending '227' against a graffiti artist who then sues them for assault--and it seems even bleaker when the key to their defense is the testimony of a lone eyewitness--Sandra.
Mary and Rose help Pearl face the loneliness of old age by escorting her to a single's bar where she meets the man of her dreams--and promptly gets engaged.
When Mary reluctantly agrees to partner with Sandra in the pillow-making business, she finds herself doing all the work--with Sandra reaping all the 'benefits.'

Lester turns into a real pain for Mary when he comes home from work early complaining of a stomach ache, but when she sneaks out for a pedicure, Lester is stricken with appendicitis--leaving Sandra to care for him.

Alarmed that her biological clock is winding down, Sandra sets out to find a perfect husband to father her child, but when she strikes out with the available men, she decides to have a baby anyway--regardless of her marital status.
Anxious to become an adult, Brenda (Regina King) takes on part-time work, but soon discovers learning how to juggle all her responsibilities is a full-time job.

Brenda attempts to ensnare a boy's affection by inviting him to her Saturday night party, and following Sandra's sneaky suggestion, she tells him the party's on Friday night--but the scheme backfires when her parents go out for the evening.

Mary flies out to California to take a spin on the popular game show 'Wheel of Fortune,' but is shocked to discover a smug Sandra as her opponent--much to the dismay of hosts Pat Sajak and Vanna White.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Josh Mullen is a musician who's doing everything he can to make it in the music business. As his band plays gigs all over the Midwest, the boys turn Josh's beat-down band van into a bodacious 1950s beach woody that'll be sure to turn heads on the road.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Lance Burk is the young owner of a feed delivery business and he really enjoys being his own boss. For the first time ever, the boys team up with Hollywood to transform Lance's old Kenworth into the Iron Man truck influenced by the blockbuster film.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Driving a truck is the only career David Goad has ever wanted and he considers it his job to help keep America's economy rolling. David's kids contact the boys and get them to turn David's worn-out Kenworth into a tribute to America's Old West.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Jay Whiteford's success in the trucking business is due to hard work and family support. Now, twenty-five years later, Jay's truck is on its last legs so the boys work to overhaul Jay's old Freightliner into a rolling tribute to Jay's career roots.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Derek Lepke has turned his passion for the outdoors into three very successful careers which operate out of his pickup truck. It's wearing down from overuse so the boys transform Derek's Ford F250 into a leopard-printed safari truck from down under!

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Rick Julian is the proud owner of a wrecking business and a volunteer with his local fire and police departments. The boys help give thanks to Rick by turning his beat-up Freightliner flatbed into a tribute to rescue vehicles.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: All Wade Hill really wants is a dependable truck he can be proud of so he can spend more time with his family. The boys turn Wade's run-down Pete 359 into a rolling tribute to Wade's favorite hobby: snowmobiling.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: David Tenpenny gave up his truck driving career in order to teach automotive mechanics in a small Kansas town, but driving never left his heart. David's class calls up the boys, who transform David's truck into a rolling educational workshop.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Gary The Honey Man Grose loves two things: honey making and educating people about honey making. Gary depends on his truck to haul everything from Honey jars to honeybees so they turn Gary's old flatbed Hino into the ultimate honey-dripping hive.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Matt Kolb is a proud grandfather and 32 year veteran of the road. Known as a kid at heart, Matt's always looking for a good time. But the bad economy and poor shape of his truck have this former wild child feeling down.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Jeff White was a proud truck driver with 17 years of experience under his belt. But his career came to a stop when his daughter Amanda suffered severe injuries in a car accident.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: CMT's hit series TRICK MY TRUCK hammers down with brand new episodes as the crew's outrageous designs and attention to detail will leave every truck-loving man or woman envious.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: CMT's hit series TRICK MY TRUCK hammers down with brand new episodes as the crew's outrageous designs and attention to detail will leave every truck-loving man or woman envious.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Todd Gauthier put his love of truck driving to the side for his son, Brian. Trucking money was not enough to put Brian through college, so Todd sacrificed his love of the road for a better paying job.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Mike Richardson is an American hero. He served our country during the Vietnam War and was awarded two purple hearts. After the war, Mike got into trucking.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: A few years ago, Darrell gave it up, became an ordained minister and founded the Best Wedding Chapel. The crown jewel of his chapel is his 1942 American La France Fire Engine.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: During his cancer treatments, Chris had to sell his Kenworth to pay the never-ending medical bills. By an amazing stroke of luck, he tracked down his old Kenworth and was able to buy it back.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of eager hopefuls -- ranging from starry-eyed rookies to experienced NFL cheerleaders -- gather at AT&T Stadium for a shot at joining the world's most famous squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 125 remaining hopefuls must nail a choreographed routine before advancing to the final rounds, and the DCC veterans reveal their plans for the future.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A former Laker Girl who survived the Las Vegas shooting chases her dream, and the women work on their solo presentations and interviews as finals approach.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The returning veterans travel to the Bahamas to shoot the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders swimsuit calendar, and the rookies feel the pressure as training camp begins.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The first-year hopefuls get new looks on Rookie Makeover Day, DCC alumni give the candidates feedback, and Cowboys' Head Coach Jason Garrett stops by during a rehearsal.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers give chase to a suspect driving a stolen vehicle. A biohazard bin an illegal knife and drugs are found during a traffic stop. Agents go undercover in an area known for heavy drug activity.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer subdues a young man in mental duress before paramedics arrive to treat him. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle and find drug paraphernalia inside the woman's car. Officers respond to a robbery in progress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted suspect tries to hide from officers, a woman calls deputies to apprehend her hostile husband, and a passenger tries to outrun the police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An out-of-control driver wants to get home for his child's birthday, officers respond to a suspected shooting, and a trip to buy dog food turns into a run-in with the police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on a dirt bike tries to elude police while dumping his firearm, and after breaking up a parking lot drug deal, an officer advises a young suspect to make better choices.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a traffic stop, a driver drops off his passenger before speeding away. Deputies are amazed when a man offers them an ID that looks nothing like him. Deputies investigate a case of road rage involving a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a suspect hoarding drugs inside a motel room. A driver admits to drug and alcohol use after being pulled over. Officers assist in the search for a runaway child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted woman gives deputies a fake name, but her brother accidentally reveals the truth, and two officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After deputies pursue a car-theft suspect to his home, he tries to convince them he has been there all along, and a man violates a protection order to try to reconcile with his wife.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young driver sends a deputy on a high-speed chase, a woman's ride home from work turns into a nightmare, and officers find hard drugs in a troubled couple's car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers go undercover as dealers on a street corner for a drug-reversal sting operation. A man's property is destroyed by his girlfriend's ill-tempered father. An officer spots an intoxicated man assaulting a woman.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers suspect meth use by a man sleeping in a bus station, a pedestrian's multiple bags of drugs suggest trafficking, and a drunk driver claims she was set up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man refusing to comply gets tased, recent texts on a suspect's phone paint a different story from what he's told officers, and a woman tries to hide evidence from police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wild-eyed man leads police on a chase that ends in a Tasing, officers respond to an in-progress lovers' spat, and a traffic stop results in drug and auto theft charges.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers deploy a police dog to persuade a reluctant suspect to come down off a roof, and an outdoor birthday celebration is crashed by an alleged drunk driver.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier hopes to make up for lost time with Freddy, but a disagreement over where to put a small Red Sox souvenir quickly escalates into a battle of wills between father and son.

programme.title: El Norte
programme.desc: Celebremos el 35 aniversario de la nominada al Oscar "El norte" en una exquisita restauración de este clásico sobre inmigrantes guatemaltecos, que huyen de la violencia y buscan una vida mejor en Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Espaldas Mojadas
programme.desc: Huyendo de la justicia, Rafael logra cruzar la frontera ayudado por Frank. En Estados Unidos, Rafael vive en constante zozobra, sin lograr adaptarse al estilo de vida americano y añorando con nostalgia su vida en México.

programme.title: ¿Por qué nací mujer?
programme.desc: Una familia se reúne para festejar el día de las madres. Ante tantos problemas, una mujer hablará lo que no ha dicho por años. Esposo, hijos y nietos escucharán su cansancio y agobio silenciado por la sumisión y la obediencia impuestas.

programme.title: Tin Tan y Las Modelos
programme.desc: Tin-Tan y su esposa Severa son los directores del Patronato de la Moral y Etica Social. Sin embargo Tin-Tan tuvo como antepasado a Casanova, quien le da tres maravillosas lecciones de amor con tres hermosas jovenes, Rosa, Teresa y Mapita.

programme.title: El grito de la muerte
programme.desc: Dos amigos se ven involucrados en una aventura al investigar sobre una figura de piedra que fue desenterrada, y a cuyo fantasma de la creadora han visto llorando.

programme.title: El inolvidable Chucho el Roto (LAS)
programme.desc: Jesús Arriaga, un astuto e inteligente ladrón enamorado de la aristócrata Matilde Frizac, se ve envuelto en una serie de infortunios que lo obligan a mantenerse separado de su hija y de Matilde.

programme.title: La vida de Chucho el Roto (LAS)
programme.desc: La vida del legendario Chucho el Roto que robaba a los ricos para dar a los pobres.

programme.title: El sol de cada mañana
programme.desc: Un pronosticador del tiempo de Chicago (Cage), separado de su esposa y sus hijos, se cuestiona si el éxito profesional y el éxito personal se excluyen mutuamente.

programme.title: Cesar Chavez
programme.desc: Michael Peña interpreta a César Chávez, que inspiró a millones de estadounidenses a luchar por la justicia social. Su viaje triunfal es un testimonio del poder de un individuo para cambiar el mundo.

programme.title: Thelma y Louise
programme.desc: En una de las mejores películas de carretera de todos los tiempos, Geena Davis y Susan Sarandon, en su paseo de la fama eterno, se convierten en dos mujeres que se embarcan en una serie de crímenes por todo el suroeste de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Más fuerte que el destino
programme.desc: Una victima del ataque terrorista del maratón de Boston en el 2013, ayuda a la policía a rastrear a los asesinos mientras lucha para recuperarse de un trauma devastador.

programme.title: Yo Soy La Salsa
programme.desc: Más que un género musical, la salsa fue un movimiento cultural que surgió de los barrios más humildes del Caribe.

programme.title: Pinero
programme.desc: Piñero" cuenta la historia del ícono latino, poeta, dramaturgo y actor Miguel Piñero.

programme.title: Ni un pelo de tonto
programme.desc: Paul Newman protagoniza a Donald Sullivan, un trabajador carismático que pasó su vida entera tomando malas decisiones. Esta interpretación le dio a Paul Newman varias nominaciones, premios y honores en su carrera artística.

programme.title: Alfie, el seductor irresistible
programme.desc: Cuando las consecuencias de su estilo de vida afectan a la mujer que ama y a su mejor amigo (Omar Epps), Alfie comienza a preguntarse si hay cosas más importantes que estos romances pasajeros. De ser así, ¿de qué se trata?

programme.title: La Mexicana
programme.desc: Un hombre trata de llevar a través de la frontera una antigua pistola llamada La Mexicana, que se cree que está maldita, mientras su novia lo presiona para que abandone sus costumbres criminales.

programme.title: Las estafadoras
programme.desc: Una mujer y su hija son estafadoras profesionales que utilizan sus armas de seducción para engañar a millonarios, hasta que la joven hija se enamora poniendo en apuros el último golpe: un excéntrico magnate del tabaco.

programme.title: Pecado original
programme.desc: Una mujer, junto con su amante, planea engañar a un hombre rico casándose con él, ganándose su confianza y luego huyendo con todo su dinero. Todo sale según lo previsto hasta que ella se enamora de él.

programme.title: Just a Little Chemistry (Solo química)
programme.desc: Una fan se encuentra dividida entre la atracción por su ídolo del cine y su mejor amigo.

programme.title: Complices
programme.desc: Un seductor experto lleva a su sobrino en un viaje a la playa en busca de mujeres calientes. Pero la única mujer capaz de causarle problemas, aparece allí.

programme.title: En el juego del asesino
programme.desc: Un detective corre contra-reloj para mantenerse un paso adelante del asesino serial, que dirige ataques mortales desde prisión. Henry Cavill y Ben Kingsley son los protagonistas de esta película llena de acción que no dejará de sorprenderte.

programme.title: El informante
programme.desc: Moe Diamond, blanqueador de capitales, sufre un accidente automovilístico que lo deja sin memoria, con millones en efectivo, y un grupo de policías corruptos persiguiéndole. Liam Hemsworth protagoniza este oscuro thriller de acción.

programme.title: Lluvia Negra
programme.desc: El ganador del Oscar(r) Michael Douglas y Andy García interpretan a dos policías de Nueva York, cuya misión de escoltar a un asesino de regreso a su Japón natal los lleva a los bajos mundos de Osaka y directamente al centro de una batalla violenta.

programme.title: La suburban dorada
programme.desc: Un policía judicial es acusado de estar relacionado con el narcotráfico solo por ayudar a su primo. Las circunstancias lo convierten en un fugitivo de la ley y por recuperar a su hijo tiene que involucrase con el narcotráfico.

programme.title: Encima de la hora
programme.desc: Gene llega a su casa después de asistir al funeral de su exesposa. Al poco tiempo, secuestran a su hija. Recibe una pistola y la tarea de matar a una persona en una hora y quince minutos. De lo contrario, su hija será asesinada.

programme.title: Turbulencia
programme.desc: Después de un tiroteo en un avión que transporta prisioneros, una azafata debe ser más lista que un persuasivo asesino en serie y aterrizar ella misma el avión.

programme.title: Hostage
programme.desc: Un negociador de la policía fracasado que se convierte en un oficial de una pequeña ciudad debe salvar a una familia secuestrada, lo que lo conduce a una situación muy peligrosa.

programme.title: Me late chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que su prometido muere inesperadamente, una mujer decide aceptar la vida y seguir su sueño de trabajar con chocolate.

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: Escobar: La herencia maldita
programme.desc: Cómo Pablo Escobar fue derrocado por las autoridades, y qué legado había significado su muerte para su heredero, Juan Pablo Escobar.

programme.title: Todos queremos a alguien
programme.desc: Karla Souza interpreta a una joven doctora soltera en Los Ángeles quien está dividida entre dos amantes y dos posibles amores, en esta divertida comedia romántica bilingüe.

programme.title: Perfectos desconocidos
programme.desc: Cuando un grupo de mejores amigos se reúne durante un eclipse lunar para compartir una cena íntima en la elegante casa de Eva y Antonio, sospechan que se trata de otra noche cualquiera hasta que la anfitriona les propone un juego.

programme.title: Veneno
programme.desc: El origen y ascenso del luchador dominicano más famoso de todos los tiempos, Rafael Sánchez alias Jack Veneno, y su archienemigo, José Manuel Guzmán alias Relámpago Hernández.

programme.title: El Perfume: Historia de un asesino
programme.desc: En Francia, en el siglo 18, vivió Jean-Baptiste Grenouille, que nació con un gran sentido del olfato. Pero cuando su don se transforma en obsesión, lucha por crear el perfume más excitante del mundo matando jovencitas para capturar su esencia.

programme.title: The Belko Experiment
programme.desc: Bienvenido a Belko Industries, un tranquilo lugar de trabajo que está a punto de convertirse en un sangriento campo de batalla, cuando 80 empleados son encerrados en su edificio de oficinas y obligados a jugar un juego despiadado de matar o morir.

programme.title: La Dama De Negro
programme.desc: Arthur Kipps (Daniel Radcliff), un abogado viudo, debe ir a un pueblo remoto a resolver los asuntos de un excéntrico recién fallecido. Pero al llegar, descubre que todos en el pueblo ocultan un secreto mortal.

programme.title: The Woman in Black 2
programme.desc: 40 años después del primer embrujo en la Casa Eel Marsh, llega un grupo de niños evacuados desde Londres en medio de la Segunda Guerra Mundial, despertando al habitante más tenebroso de la casa.

programme.title: 666: The Child (LAS)
programme.desc: Un avión de pasajeros se precipita en vuelo. De las brasas ardientes se levanta un único sobreviviente solitario: un niño pequeño. La pareja sin hijos que lo adoptó pronto descubrirá que no es un niño indefenso sino algo muy poderoso.

programme.title: Victor Crowley
programme.desc: Diez años después de la terrible masacre, el único sobreviviente, Andrew Yong, se ve obligado a regresar al Pantano de la Isla Honey, pero por una de esas extrañas vueltas de la vida, Victor Crowley es resucitado por error.

programme.title: Teaching Mrs. Tingle
programme.desc: El sueño de Leigh Ann (Katie Holmes) de acceder a una beca se viene abajo cuando su profesora, la Sra. Tingle, la acusa falsamente de hacer trampa. Desesperada por probar su inocencia, hace un plan que le enseñará una lección a la Sra. Tingle.

programme.title: Pequeña gran vida
programme.desc: Gracias a un descubrimiento científico que permite encoger a los seres humanos, Paul y su esposa deciden hacerse pequeños y vivir en una comunidad miniatura. Paul sabe que algo grande les espera.

programme.title: Locos por el juego
programme.desc: Un famoso jugador de bolos con una carrera "cortada" prematuramente quiere llevar a un nuevo prodigio al éxito.

programme.title: Norbit
programme.desc: Murphy protagoniza a un Norbit apacible, que recibe una segunda oportunidad con el amor de su infancia, Kate. Sin embargo, los obstáculos podrían complicar este romance más de lo esperado.

programme.title: Siete psicópatas y un perro
programme.desc: Un guionista en apuros, sin darse cuenta, se enreda en el inframundo criminal de Los Ángeles después de que sus locos amigos desequilibrados secuestran al amado perro Shih Tzu de un gángster.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el policia? 33 1/3: el insulto final
programme.desc: La noche de los Óscar(r). ¿Puede alguien echar ese zoquete? ¡Esperen! No es un zoquete cualquiera, es el Tte. Frank Drebin. ¡Y se coló para detener un atentado terrorista!

programme.title: El Loco Superdotado
programme.desc: El constantemente pobre Darryl se arriesga a perder su trabajo soñado en Wall Street hasta que encuentra un experimento que paga bien y que le otorga sentidos superhumanos... y competitividad. Pero con los efectos secundarios, ¡todo puede pasar!

programme.title: El Dorado
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum plays to perfection an alcoholic but gutsy sheriff who relentlessly battles the dark side of the wild West, ruthless cattle barons and crooked “businessmen.”

programme.title: Red River

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs, and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!

programme.title: El Dorado
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum plays to perfection an alcoholic but gutsy sheriff who relentlessly battles the dark side of the wild West, ruthless cattle barons and crooked “businessmen.”

programme.title: It's A Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World

programme.title: Irma La Douce

programme.desc: A man suspected of the cold case murder of his wife and son hatches a new plot to kill his mother and father; and detectives solve the 20-year-old murder of a teenager by tricking her killer into licking an envelope.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A bloody dagger and a phone tap help detectives solve a 20-year-old murder case. And DNA taken from an eyelash found on a dead prostitute's body brings a killer to justice.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Police in Overland Park, Kansas, hunt for over 15 years for a serial killer who lures women to Kansas for sadomasochistic sexual trysts at hotels.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Police reopen a rape-murder case 25 years after the crime and find enough DNA evidence to bring him to justice. And a confession made to a "Baywatch" TV star helps police solve the three-year-old riddle of a wealthy Newport Beach woman's murder.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Detectives are baffled when two young girls are raped, murdered, and dumped in an abandoned house in Akron, Ohio. And a 26-year-old mother of three disappears on Christmas Eve in 1995, but the missing person case goes cold when police can find few clues

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: While hiking with husband Dennis in Montana, Leslee Larson fell into Wolf Creek. Then Dennis is convicted of murdering his wife, while in Main. And 15-year-old papergirl Penny Parker goes missing, then her body is found by a search volunteer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Police must wait nearly 30 years before advances in DNA technology give them the chance to convict the killer of a young hitchhiker, and Philadelphia police wage a 16-year hunt for the man who raped and killed a 10-year-old girl.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: 'Tis the season to learn about history's finest Yuletide stories, from George Washington crossing the Delaware to Charles Dickens's creation of modern-day Christmas, with guest stars Ken Marino, Rob Corddry and Colin Hanks.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Robert E. Lee's estate becomes a burial ground for Union soldiers, counterfeiters attempt to steal Abraham Lincoln's body, and an embalmed bandit makes his way around the country. Featuring Jason Ritter, Justin Long and Jimmy O. Yang.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Questlove, Method Man, Raven-Symone and more celebrate the early history of hip hop, the man known for inventing Motown, Berry Gordy, and "Star Trek" actress Nichelle Nichols's incredible activism on and off the TV screen.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: An Italian handyman steals the "Mona Lisa," the "Santa bandits" rob a bank in Texas, and Mossad agents capture a Nazi general in Argentina. Featuring Jack Black, Johnny Knoxville, Tony Hale, "Weird Al" Yankovic and Rachel Bloom.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Joan of Arc leads the French during the Hundred Years' War, Mongol leader Genghis Khan rises to power, and Mansa Musa leads a pilgrimage to Mecca. Featuring Vanessa Hudgens, Randall Park and Donald Faison.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Colin Hanks, David Harbour and Kimiko Glenn celebrate Fred Rogers and his fight for government-funded children's TV, the female journalist who helped take down John D. Rockefeller's oil monopoly and the designer of the Vietnam Veterans Memorial.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Tatiana Maslany, Kat Dennings and Ali Stroker salute Suffragettes who fought for their rights with jujitsu, the Birmingham Children's March and disability rights activists who organized America's longest sit-in of a federal building.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Drunk History investigates Agatha Christie's disappearance, the anonymous letter writer who terrorized Circleville and the mastermind behind America's only unsolved airplane hijacking, with Kirsten Dunst, Vanessa Bayer and Taran Killam.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Actor Clark Gable joins the Air Force during World War II, Ponce de Leon quarrels with Diego Columbus, and Griselda Blanco takes over the cocaine trade in Miami. Featuring Josh Hartnett, Maya Rudolph, David Koechner and Johnny Knoxville.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Paleontologists Othniel Marsh and Edward Cope become rivals, and Penzias & Wilson discover the echo of the Big Bang. Featuring Greg Kinnear, Stephen Merchant, Justin Long, Jason Ritter, Tony Hale and Christopher Meloni.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Pirate John Lafitte helps Andrew Jackson defeat the British during the War of 1812, Sam Zemurray becomes a banana kingpin, and Louis Armstrong becomes a jazz legend. Featuring Jack McBrayer, Thomas Middleditch, Jason Momoa, Miles Brown and Andre Royo.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Harriet Tubman provides military intel to the Union Army, Virginia Hall spies in France during World War II and becomes the first woman in the CIA, and Roald Dahl serves as a debonair British spy. Featuring Octavia Spencer, Alia Shawkat and Will Ferrell.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Wayne Wheeler becomes the face of Prohibition, Dorothy Fuldheim breaks barriers in news broadcasting, and Muhammad Ali refuses to fight in the Vietnam War. Featuring Gaius Charles, Samm Levine, Mary Elizabeth Ellis, George Wallace and Ron Funches.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Vigilantes led by Andres Pico enact street justice, Rin Tin Tin becomes the world's biggest movie star, and the construction of the L.A. aqueduct brings riches to city officials. Featuring Jack Black, Kyle Gass, Ryan Phillippe and Giancarlo Esposito.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Nellie Bly and Elizabeth Bisland try to travel around the world in under 80 days, and Thomas Nast's political cartoons lead to the downfall of Tammany Hall leader "Boss" Tweed. Featuring Michael Cera, Ellie Kemper, Natasha Leggero and Jason Alexander.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Kentucky Daisy stakes a claim to land, Gordon Cooper overcomes mechanical issues on a one-man space mission, and African-American Deputy Marshal Bass Reeves is the inspiration for the Lone Ranger. Featuring Kat Dennings, Colin Hanks and Jaleel White.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Milton Bradley popularizes board games, Roger Sharpe helps overturn a pinball ban, and chess master Bobby Fischer defeats Russian rival Boris Spassky during the Cold War. Featuring Topher Grace, Zach Gilford, Taran Killam and Jake Johnson.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Popé leads the Pueblo Indians in a revolt, Boy Scouts founder Ernest Thompson Seton tracks a wolf, and the truth behind the Roswell UFO conspiracy is revealed. Featuring Colin Hanks, Jason Mantzoukas, Rob Huebel, Tom Lennon and Patton Oswalt.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Alexander Graham Bell steals the original design for the telephone from Elisha Gray, and Thomas Edison tries to create a movie-making monopoly. Featuring Parker Posey, Chris Parnell, Jason Ritter, Martin Starr, Michael McKean and Henry Winkler.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: J.T. McWilliams forms a community but is muscled out by William Clark, Bugsy Siegel bets his life on the Flamingo Casino, and the Moulin Rouge is the first casino to break the color barrier. Featuring Sam Rockwell, Donald Faison, and Dennis Quaid.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Carl Sagan and Ann Druyan fall in love, Wernher von Braun becomes the father of American rocket science, and Russian cosmonauts perform the first spacewalk. Chelsea Peretti, Paul Scheer, Adam Devine, Blake Anderson and Nathan Fillion guest star.

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: New mom Danica received 5 different emails from 5 women claiming that they slept with her man Jimmy in her home. Then, will Renee's man choose his addiction over his family?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Rachelle believes that her man Chris may be cheating with as many as 50 women, including her sister! Then, Carrie was shocked when she found out that her man Chris lied about his military service.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Denese and her mom return because they know Dejon fathered Denese's daughter! Plus, Rebecca has been on 6 times for 7 DNA tests and returns for her 8th and 9th tests! Will any of these men be her kids' fathers?

programme.title: People's Court
programme.desc: Michael is suing Brian for the cost to bail him out of jail but Brian said it was his girlfriend who called for help.

programme.title: People's Court
programme.desc: Donna says the defendants stored their old beat up RV on her property and they owe her money.

programme.title: People's Court
programme.desc: Anthony wants David to pay over $1300 in rent and belongings he claims David trashed.

programme.title: People's Court
programme.desc: Bruce says he thought he purchased a real taxidermy sail fish but says Michael fooled him into buying a plastic toy.

programme.title: People's Court
programme.desc: David is suing John after he was unable to get the car registered because he claims the title wasn't notarized.

programme.title: People's Court
programme.desc: Mirtha is suing her ex-husband for stealing her car and leaving her to pay the bills after he up and left.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Charisma thinks her fiancé Trey is cheating with her cousin! Then, is Dustin is cheating and being helped by his father? Later, Greg has a thing for big women. His wife Jessica wants to know if it's just a phase or if she's been betrayed by his family!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Krista isn't sure if the father of her baby is her husband, her ex-boyfriend or her ex's nephew! Then, Latasha is mad because her sister told her man that she slept with 4 other men, and he may not be the father of her baby!

programme.title: The Maury Show: I'll Prove You Are Cheating on My Teen!
programme.desc: Chris cheated and impregnated Lakin's neighbor. He denies he fathered Lakin’s baby. Then, John’s back for a 3rd DNA test. Can Jade prove that he’s the father or is her record 0-3?

programme.title: The Maury Show: 4 Women … 4 Babies … Is He the Father?
programme.desc: We have more of the paternity pandemonium that you crave! You’ll see denying dads, mad moms and some of the most shocking results we’ve ever seen! Don’t miss one second of the drama on today’s MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: After a night of passion with her neighbor, Lashanda claims that Avery is the father, but his girlfriend isn't having it! Plus, Nikki needs to prove that she has never cheated on Daniel or her relationship with her entire family will be on the line!

programme.title: La venganza de İffet
programme.desc: Los sueños de İffet de casarse con Cemil, un taxista, se desarman cuando él la agrede sexualmente y se casa con otra. Pero cuando ella se casa con su acaudalado jefe en venganza, Cemil hará todo para reconquistarla.

programme.title: Recuerda corazón

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After all the craziness of last year, Craig has one overriding goal: no drama. He’s focused on his friends, his family, his studies, and his band – a reconstituted Downtown Sasquatch but no Spinner - a new addition is rocking the drum-kit…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After proving he’s still got talent on the hardwood, Jimmy is invited to try out for the Wheelchair Basketball Association’s Junior Team. It’s Jimmy’s second chance at athletic stardom, and an opportunity to make his father proud.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Liberty’s pregnancy enters its sixth month, she and JT are forced to face reality: even though no longer a couple, they have to deal with the pregnancy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Desperate for cash, JT has stolen drugs from the pharmacy… He becomes entangled in a web between his boss, the drug dealer, and the police.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Someone’s definitely interested in Marco. But as it turns out, Tim is interested in Marco, but not for the expected reason. Tim knows Marco is gay, and has been struggling with how to come out to his friends and family.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The one-year anniversary of the school shooting is approaching and everyone’s feeling the weight of it. Not least of whom is Spinner Mason, still persona non grata.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight is the premiere of “Jay and Silent Bob Go Canadian, Eh” and with many of the students and faculty on the guest list, it’s like the whole school is gripped in movie premiere fever!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige wakes Alex up in her bed – Paige spent the night on the floor – and as the two girls awkwardly prepare for school, they try to avoid the elephant in the room. As in, that they KISSED last night. What happened?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig bursts into rehearsal with the good news – they’ve been accepted to perform at a Northern Sounds Showcase. The band is NOT so into it at first – music is Craig’s dream, not theirs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Since being "saved" everything has been going Spinner's way: he's made a good friend in Friendship Club leader Linus; his relationship with Darcy has been going strong, and his recent interest in improving school life has been getting him noticed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Simpson-Nelson household is in chaos. With Snake gone and Spike totally down in the dumps, keeping the household together has fallen totally onto Emma’s shoulders.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is finally getting some control over her life. Snake and Spike are back together, she’s been running every day, and she’s barely eating.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Facing the pressure of year-end exams, the furthest thing from Marco’s mind is what happened a year ago – when Dylan stomped all over his heart. Marco takes this as a sign that he’s over Dylan for good.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The end of another school year finds Darcy’s faith – in her boyfriend – being put to the test. When she discovers that Spinner has a past, Darcy grapples with a harsh reality of teen romance: jealousy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Peter receives a new car for his birthday, he quickly becomes a frequent face in the street racing scene.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things heat up between Emma and Sean – and when she takes time off from Peter to consider her relationship with Sean, Peter takes action – and Sean winds up expelled from Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is happy that the racing debacle is behind them, and that Peter is finally free if you don’t count the house arrest and five hundred hours of community service.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Darcy’s online admirers take up more and more of her time, and her relationship with Spinner suffers. As Darcy posts increasingly sexy photos of herself, she’s surprised when her favourite online fan decides to introduce himself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Career Aptitude test results come in, Spinner is less than pleased with his results, and in desperation, convinces Jimmy to go into business selling T-shirts adorned with Jimmy’s illustrations.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this stunt one of the contestants will be seated on a platform above the water wearing weighted boots. Laying face down on the floor, contestants' heads are placed in separate medieval looking helmets, filled with snakes and rats.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will each be standing on the back of a flatbed truck driving down the edge of a pier. Contestant must guide their blindfolded partner through a maze of electrical tripwires.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this couples stunt, each contestant will be standing on a beam that is suspended in the air off the sides of a train box car. In a banquet room, couples will feed each other as much disgusting food as they can.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Both contestants in the finals will be riding on the back of an Ultraboat as a helicopter settles in overhead. Male contestant is placed in a bamboo cage filled with large bullfrogs, which is then lowered into a pit.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A rope will be suspended between two helicopters. Contestants will be standing in a tall cage. Contestants must discover a key to a ‘box of worms', which will be transferred onto a scale.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant is locked by their waist to the drivers seat and wrist to the steering wheel. Contestants determine the quantity and variety of Fear Factor Sushi they will have to eat. A six-inch wide beam will be sticking out perpendicular from a roof top.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be seated in a helicopter and hanging directly under the skids. One of the partners will be dangling by their ankles and hanging by their ankle.

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on a beam above the water and must make their way around the structure. Contestant will climb through a plexi-glass tunnel. A struss structure will be wrapped by cargo netting and hung beneath a 212 helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A beam will be hung above another beam. Contestants are to devour the covered trays that conceal six different types of Fear Factor Sausage. Both team members will be seated in separate stunt cars on opposite ends of a track.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on opposite skids of the same helicopter. Contestants are hogtied with duct tape on the floor of a meat locker. Contestants will be lying on their backs in a 72-foot-long trough on the roof of a building.

programme.desc: A veterans' support group becomes a lifeline for Commander Michaels, who continues to deal with post-traumatic stress disorder. Meanwhile, she discovers that her son David came into the emergency room due to an accident.

programme.desc: A pastor must follow a church council's decision to fire most of the staff at the school because they're not Christian.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark attends his high school class reunion and learns that some memories are bittersweet for his old friends.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven

programme.desc: David Sloan is on a mission to free his wife who has been enslaved by an evil world champion, Tong Po. He attempts to gain entry into Po’s savage kingdom by fighting in the tournament of champions where the winner takes all.

programme.title: Kickboxer: Vengeance
programme.desc: A man seeks revenge against a brutal martial-arts fighter.

programme.desc: When MMA fighter Kurt Sloane is forced into an underground death match with a 400lb drug-enhanced killer, he seeks help from the legendary Master Durand (Jean-Claude Van Damme) and prison fighter Briggs (Mike Tyson) to survive the fight.

programme.title: DOA: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The world's best fighters are invited to DOA, a martial-arts tournament. Four female rival fighters, an aristocratic warrior, a wrestling superstar, an athlete with a tragic past, and an assassin-for-hire, work together to uncover a secret.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Únete a Tony en su búsqueda del bar perfecto en Nueva York. Descubra la composición química correcta de las bebidas, las alegrías de los bares de mala muerte y la necesidad de aperitivos a altas horas de la noche.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Tony viaja a la capital del cinturón de cereales de Minneapolis, Minnesota, para experimentar de primera mano el conflicto entre los operadores creativos independientes y las franquicias genéricas.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Casa Roma en Lancaster, California. Aunque su barra está repleta, el comedor de Casa Roma está vacío.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Mojito's, un restaurante cubano en Brooklyn. Los dueños compraron el restaurante como recién casados, pero ahora tienen siete años de un matrimonio y un negocio que se desmorona.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Ridgewood, Nueva Jersey, para rejuvenecer a Bazzini, un restaurante italiano obstaculizado por un servicio lento y un personal de cocina mediocre.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Nueva Jersey, el chef Ramsay visita Flamango's, un restaurante obsoleto que necesita ayuda.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Filadelfia, Pensilvania, para visitar Hot Potato Cafe. Encuentra a un dueño agotado por la pasión que ha creado un ambiente tóxico lleno de negatividad.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Ramsay descubre que el restaurante mexicano Mama Rita's sufre de una cocina desorganizada. Mientras tanto, la dueña puede tener que sacrificar una amistad para salvar su negocio.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay encuentra una segunda ubicación fallida de un restaurante familiar.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Lido di Manhattan, un local italiano con una cocina antiestética y un propietario sin experiencia. Está tan horrorizado que cierra el lugar temporalmente.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay pasa por un restaurante francés y descubre que él y el jefe de cocina tienen una formación culinaria similar. Sin embargo, el chef niega la mala calidad de la comida de su restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Anna Vincenzo's, un restaurante familiar en Boca Raton, Florida. Se entera de que el obstinado dueño no acepta el cambio. Después de que se ignoran sus ideas, Ramsay se marcha.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Fleming, un restaurante danés en Miami. El obstinado dueño no quiere actualizar el lugar y Ramsay descubre algo en la hielera que lo lleva a cerrar el restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita el Pabellón Español en Nueva Jersey. Descubre que un par de hermanos en disputa están llevando el restaurante al suelo. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay llega a un restaurante endeudado propiedad de dos ex meseras y las cosas están tan mal que Ramsay realiza una intervención para abordar el tema del liderazgo.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murders of an elderly couple leave police stumped until, two years later, they receive a major break. A jeweler looking through old newspaper clippings recognizes a necklace the female victim wore as having been pawned in her own shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: By using techniques she saw on forensic science TV shows, a mother determines who was responsible for the accident that permanently injured her 4-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, Judy Southern arrived home from work and was shot by a gunman waiting within. Her husband arrived shortly afterwards, called emergency services and drove her to the hospital.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of 9-year-old Jessica Knott, police use a garbage bag to connect suspect James Edward Crow, Jr. to the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the decomposed body of a teenage girl is discovered, police have no clues to her identity. To solve the case, investigators turn to bug larvae found on the body and a tiny wad of chewing gum found near the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Who was the sexual offender who murdered two adolescent boys in Nebraska? The key to stopping him would be the unique composition of the "junk rope" he used to tie his victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was supposed to be a routine motorcade for the Queen of England. But on the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the series premiere of "Forensic Files", the longest-running true crime series in history, a Connecticut flight attendant goes missing. Police suspect her husband is guilty of murder, but can they prove it?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, college co-ed Jenna Verhaalen was found dead in her Bryan, Texas apartment. Petechial hemorrhages in her eyes indicated that she was strangled.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family were executed in their own home. For three years, the murders went unsolved. Finally, a 30-year-old box of ammunition and some fluorescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A fire erupts in Kings Cross Station in London, killing 31 people and injuring dozens more. Investigators pinpoint the cause of the fire, but it takes state-of-the-art technology and fluid dynamics experts to explain why it became a deadly inferno.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student vanished without a trace, her fellow students were concerned about her safety and their own.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old girl disappears from a remote Alaska town, investigators wonder if she has been attacked by a bear or become lost in the dense woods. Eventually, they realize that neither assumption is true.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One warm summer afternoon, the town of Verona, Wisconsin faced its first triple homicide. To solve the case, investigators had to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this episode, the decade-old murder of a young Texas housewife is investigated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone or if she was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A fifteen-year-old boy dies from a mysterious gunshot wound to the head while sitting in the lobby of his father's gun club. Ballistics, laser technology, made-to-scale models and the latest in forensic animation are used to find the cause.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the early hours of a morning just before Christmas, a college student was abducted from the parking lot of her apartment. Her body was found later that day; she had been sexually assaulted and shot at point-blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young couple decided to celebrate their first wedding anniversary with a camping trip to Mount Hood. During the trip, the husband was shot and killed. Later, his wife told two different versions of the events which led to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When investigators found Bruce Miller dead in the office of his junkyard business, the crime scene was almost pristine. But when a computer forensics expert examined computers owned by the victim's wife and her lover, he found all the evidence needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, construction manager Darrell North was found dead in his work trailer in Ft. Worth, Texas. When investigators arrived, they found that he had been stabbed 46 times, indicating a personal relationship between the victim and the attacker.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, the founder of American Atheists disappeared with one of her sons, her granddaughter and $500,000 in gold coins. The police investigated several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the state of Florida was known for more than just Disney World. Worldwide attention focused on a rash of robberies which targeted tourists. Some vacationers were killed in these attacks, but some fought and survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after becoming pregnant by Dr. Maynard Muntzing, firefighter Michelle Baker's health quickly deteriorates. Eventually, she raises suspicions that Muntzing is doing her harm.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young hairdresser was sexually assaulted and murdered in her own beauty salon. The evidence at the crime scene didn't match any of the suspects and, after the initial investigation, the case went cold for ten years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2001, Ginger Hayes and her infant son were abducted during a carjacking. The crime had been reported by a witness within minutes of occurrence.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Amigos por correspondencia

programme.title: Un vistazo al amor

programme.title: Amor bajo el sol

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día seis
programme.desc: En la primera mitad de este especial de dos horas, el chef Ramsay revela el último giro: cada equipo creará su propio menú que consta de tres aperitivos, platos principales y postres.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día siete
programme.desc: En la parte final de este especial de dos horas, los cinco concursantes restantes descubren que ya no compiten como equipos, sino como individuos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día ocho
programme.desc: Los cuatro chefs restantes reciben quince minutos y una bandeja con sobras para crear una comida que el chef Ramsay considera servible.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día nueve
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay ordena a los tres concursantes restantes que sirvan una cena completa. ¿Quién creará el mejor plato y quién será enviado a casa sin postre?

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez
programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los dos finalistas, con la ayuda de los chefs eliminados, compiten en una simulación que pone a prueba sus habilidades para administrar un restaurante.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día uno
programme.desc: En este estreno de temporada de dos horas, doce chefs comienzan su viaje hacia el premio final: un puesto de chef ejecutivo en el recientemente inaugurado Red Rock Casino, Resort and Spa en Las Vegas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día dos
programme.desc: Después de una desastrosa noche de apertura, ambos equipos aprenden la importancia del servicio en un restaurante: servir mesas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día tres
programme.desc: Frustrado después de otro mediocre servicio en la cena, el chef Ramsay comparte algunas de sus experiencias dirigiendo un exitoso restaurante mientras prepara la competencia de la tercera noche.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cuatro
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay pone fin a la batalla de los sexos y "Hell's Kitchen" abre nuevos caminos cuando los equipos cocinan para un grupo especialmente exigente: los niños.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cinco
programme.desc: El quinto día comienza con el chef Ramsay dando una lección a los concursantes restantes sobre el arte del sabor culinario.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día seis
programme.desc: Los seis chefs restantes preparan sus platos originales, y los dos equipos diseñan sus menús para la cena de la noche.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Dia siete
programme.desc: Los chefs deben trabajar como equipo por primera vez. El premio de este desafío es un viaje con el chef Ramsay al Red Rock Casino, Resort and Spa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día ocho
programme.desc: Con solo cuatro chefs restantes, la competencia se vuelve feroz. ¿Quién de ellos tiene lo que se necesita para ser el jefe de cocina del nuevo restaurante de Gordon Ramsay?
